# MikeyGoldGrid

MikeyGoldGrid is a sophisticated automated algorithmic trading robot (Expert Advisor) built for MetaTrader 5, specializing in gold (XAU/USD) trading using a grid strategy. The brand projects trust, professionalism, and financial authority with a sleek dark aesthetic. The product targets serious traders seeking passive income through automation, and the website must convey performance credibility through statistics, charts, and a clear purchase funnel — from hero CTA to a simple 3-step onboarding guide and FAQ support.

Source: https://mikeygoldgrid-4c3beb67.zappy5.app

---

## Automate Gold Profits with a Smart MT5 Trading Robot — MikeyGoldGrid

URL: https://mikeygoldgrid-4c3beb67.zappy5.app
Description: Unlock passive income with MikeyGoldGrid, the elite MT5 trading robot for XAU/USD. Harness a proven grid strategy, real-time stats, and seamless automation. Start earning smarter today.

## Engineered for Gold


A specialized MT5 trading robot built exclusively for XAU/USD, combining grid strategy discipline with institutional-grade execution.












### Gold-Focused Logic



MikeyGoldGrid is purpose-built for XAU/USD, tuned to the metal's unique volatility windows and liquidity patterns. No generic multi-asset noise — just precision-engineered gold trading.


Symbol: XAU/USD
Volatility: Adaptive












### Grid Strategy Automation



Structured position spacing with repeatable execution rules removes emotional bias. The algorithm systematically layers entries and exits, capturing range-bound gold moves while managing risk through disciplined grid parameters.


Mode: Automated
Risk: Controlled











### MT5 Expert Advisor Workflow



Seamless MetaTrader 5 integration means straightforward activation. Drag, drop, attach to chart — the EA handles execution while you monitor performance through native MT5 reporting and real-time terminal feedback.


Platform: MT5
Setup: One-Click

















## Performance shown with clarity, not noise.


Present backtest summaries, forward-test snapshots, and risk parameters in a way that serious traders can evaluate quickly.


Trading involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

## Get Started in 3 Simple Steps


Launch your automated gold trading system on MetaTrader 5 with minimal effort. Our setup wizard and dedicated support ensure a smooth onboarding experience for traders of all levels.




01


### Install on MetaTrader 5


Download the MikeyGoldGrid Expert Advisor file and place it into your MT5 'Experts' directory. Restart the platform or refresh the Navigator panel to see the automated trading robot ready for activation.





02


### Attach to XAU/USD


Open a gold (XAU/USD) chart on the M15 timeframe. Drag the MikeyGoldGrid EA onto the chart and apply the recommended parameters. The system will immediately begin analyzing market conditions for optimal grid placement.





03


### Monitor Automation


Review your risk settings, ensure VPS continuity for 24/7 operation, and monitor trade behavior through the MT5 terminal. The gold trading bot executes autonomously while you track performance in real-time.






Need help with setup? Contact support before going live.














## Ready to deploy a dedicated gold trading robot?


Start with a clear setup path and professional support for MikeyGoldGrid on MetaTrader 5.


Contact Support to Get Started

XAU/USD Grid



Support Available

# Built specifically for automated gold trading.


MikeyGoldGrid is an Expert Advisor for MetaTrader 5 designed around XAU/USD market behavior, structured grid entries, and disciplined automation rules.







XAU/USD · GRID EA · M5



Symbol
XAU/USD


Bid
2,031.45


Ask
2,031.78


Spread
3.3



Grid Levels
5 Active


Orders Open
3 Buys / 2 Sells


Floating P/L
+$142.80
















## Algorithmic Precision for XAU/USD


MikeyGoldGrid operates on a rigorously tested grid methodology, designed to capitalize on gold's unique intraday volatility while maintaining strict risk parameters. Every trade is executed with institutional-grade logic, removing human emotion from the equation.








### Structured Grid Logic


The core of MikeyGoldGrid is a dynamic grid system that places buy and sell orders at calculated intervals above and below the market price. This structured price spacing captures profit from natural market oscillations, turning sideways and ranging conditions into consistent income opportunities.



Parameter
Spacing












Parameter
Exposure



### Gold Volatility Awareness


XAU/USD exhibits distinct behavioral patterns compared to currency pairs. Our algorithm is fine-tuned to gold's specific volatility profile, adjusting grid spacing and lot sizing dynamically based on real-time ATR (Average True Range) and market session liquidity, ensuring the robot adapts rather than breaks under pressure.














### Rule-Based Execution


Emotional trading is the single largest destroyer of retail accounts. MikeyGoldGrid operates on a fixed set of pre-programmed rules — entry logic, take profit, stop loss, and trailing stops are executed with zero hesitation. This automated trading system ensures discipline is maintained 24/5, even when you are away from the screen.



Parameter
Execution


















## Engineered for Consistent Execution


MikeyGoldGrid removes emotional decision-making from your gold trading. Every trade follows the same proven logic, every time.









### Automated Monitoring


The robot scans XAU/USD markets around the clock, identifying grid entry points without requiring you to stay glued to the screen. It executes trades while you focus on what matters.









### Consistent Trade Rules


Every position is managed by a strict, backtested algorithm. No impulsive entries, no revenge trading — just disciplined grid logic that treats every pip with the same calculated precision.









### MT5 Compatibility


Built natively for MetaTrader 5, MikeyGoldGrid installs in minutes with no complex configuration. It leverages MT5's advanced hedging and depth-of-market features for optimal grid execution.









### Designed for XAU/USD


Unlike generic trading bots, MikeyGoldGrid is laser-focused on gold. Its grid parameters are optimized for XAU/USD volatility patterns, spread behavior, and session-specific liquidity profiles.














## Responsible Trading & Risk Disclosure


MikeyGoldGrid is a trading automation tool, not a guarantee of profit. Users should understand leverage, spreads, drawdown, and market volatility before activating live trading.









### Use Proper Lot Sizing


Always calculate position size based on your account balance and risk tolerance. Over-leveraging can lead to rapid losses, especially in volatile gold markets.








### Test Settings First


Run the MikeyGoldGrid MT5 trading robot on a demo account for at least 2-4 weeks before deploying live capital. Validate performance across different market conditions.








### Understand Market Risk


Gold trading involves significant risk. Past performance of any automated trading system does not guarantee future results. Never trade with money you cannot afford to lose.






CFDs are complex instruments and come with a high risk of losing money rapidly due to leverage. You should consider whether you understand how CFDs work and whether you can afford to take the high risk of losing your money.




















Next-generation algorithmic trading — precision, speed, and gold-standard execution for the modern investor.

# Evaluate performance through clean trading metrics.


A serious trading tool should communicate results with context, including drawdown awareness, execution conditions, and testing assumptions.

## Performance Metrics


Key performance indicators from rigorous backtesting and forward testing of our MT5 trading robot. Real, verified data builds trust in your algorithmic edge.





2018–2024

### Backtest Window


Extensive multi-year backtesting across diverse market regimes, ensuring the gold trading bot adapts to volatility, trends, and consolidation phases with consistent logic.




18.4%

### Max Drawdown


Controlled risk exposure with a hard-coded drawdown limit. The automated trading system prioritizes capital preservation while executing its grid-based strategy.




4h 22m

### Avg Trade Duration


Swift trade execution with an average holding time under five hours, reducing overnight gap risk and taking advantage of intraday gold liquidity.




12.7%

### Grid Exposure


Dynamic lot sizing keeps peak margin exposure low relative to account equity, allowing the automated trading system to scale efficiently without over-leverage.




Use verified broker-specific data before publishing live claims. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
















## What the chart should help traders understand.



An automated grid trading system like MikeyGoldGrid operates by placing strategic buy and sell orders at predetermined intervals. The equity curve is not a straight line upward—it reflects the dynamic nature of the XAU/USD market. Understanding the relationship between price movement, entry scaling, and drawdown periods is essential before deploying any MT5 trading robot.



Drawdown periods are a natural component of grid strategies. When the market moves against open positions, the system systematically averages into the trend, accumulating entries at favorable levels. This disciplined approach requires sufficient capital allocation and patience, as recovery periods depend on market volatility and the configured grid spacing.



Market conditions significantly influence performance. Trending environments with clear directional momentum allow the grid to capture retracements efficiently, while prolonged consolidation ranges can extend holding times. A well-calibrated gold trading bot adapts to varying volatility regimes through parameter optimization rather than attempting to predict market direction.



Broker execution quality also plays a critical role. Slippage, spread widening during news events, and server latency can affect entry and exit precision. Traders should select brokers with deep liquidity pools and fast execution speeds to ensure the algorithmic logic performs as designed.




XAU/USD
Primary Instrument


Grid Strategy
Trading Method


MT5
Platform

Entry Level 2

Transparency & Trust

## Built on Disciplined Principles


Every parameter is disclosed, every risk is measured, and every assumption is transparent. Institutional-grade credibility for serious traders.












### Transparent Assumptions


We disclose every backtesting parameter openly. No hidden spreads, no unrealistic fills. The MikeyGoldGrid MT5 trading robot operates under real-world execution conditions so you know exactly what to expect.


- Real variable spreads (not fixed 0.0)

- Commission & swap costs included

- 99.9% tick data quality










### Broker Conditions Matter


Performance varies significantly across brokers. Our automated trading system is optimized for ECN/RAW accounts with low latency execution. We provide recommended broker settings to align your gold trading bot environment with our testing infrastructure.


- ECN/RAW account type required

- Max spread tolerance: 25 points

- VPS hosting recommended










### Risk Parameters First


Capital preservation is the foundation of our strategy. MikeyGoldGrid includes customizable drawdown limits, dynamic lot sizing, and equity protection triggers. You control the exposure before the automated trading system executes a single trade.


- Configurable max drawdown %

- Dynamic lot sizing based on balance

- News filter & time management












Risk Disclosure: Trading foreign exchange and CFDs involves significant risk and may not be suitable for all investors. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Ensure you fully understand the risks before using any automated trading system.

# From download to live monitoring in three clear steps.


MikeyGoldGrid is designed for traders who want a guided setup path on MetaTrader 5 before activating automation. Our streamlined onboarding process ensures your gold trading bot is configured, tested, and running with minimal effort, so you can focus on what matters — consistent performance in the XAU/USD market.


Ask for Setup Support












MikeyGoldGrid · Terminal



Platform


MT5



Instrument


XAU/USD



EA Status


Active



















Get Started

## How to Set Up Your MT5 Trading Robot


Follow these three simple steps to deploy MikeyGoldGrid and begin automated gold trading with confidence.











01




### Prepare MetaTrader 5


Ensure your trading environment is ready before loading the automated trading system. A properly configured platform is essential for optimal performance.


- MT5 installed and updated to latest version

- Broker account connected with sufficient funds

- XAU/USD symbol visible in Market Watch








02




### Load MikeyGoldGrid


Attach the Expert Advisor to your XAU/USD chart and configure the parameters to match your risk tolerance and account size.


- Expert Advisor file added to MT5 Experts folder

- Input parameters reviewed and optimized

- AutoTrading and DLL imports enabled








03




### Go Live Responsibly


Launch your gold trading bot with proper risk management. Monitor performance and let the algorithm execute your strategy around the clock.


- Lot size verified against account balance

- VPS considered for 24/7 uptime

- Performance monitored via MT5 terminal








Get MikeyGoldGrid Now
Read the FAQ
















## System Requirements


Ensure your trading environment meets the minimum specifications for optimal performance of the MikeyGoldGrid MT5 trading robot.





REQ-01


CRITICAL



### MetaTrader 5 Platform


A fully installed and updated MetaTrader 5 desktop terminal is required. Our Gold trading bot runs natively as an Expert Advisor, utilizing the full depth of MT5's advanced order execution and hedging capabilities.




REQ-02


CRITICAL



### Broker Offering XAU/USD


You must connect to a reputable broker that offers the XAU/USD symbol with competitive spreads and low commission structures. The automated trading system is optimized for gold's unique volatility profile.




REQ-03


RECOMMENDED



### Stable Internet or VPS


For uninterrupted 24/5 execution, we strongly recommend a low-latency Virtual Private Server (VPS) located near your broker's data center. A stable internet connection is the minimum baseline for running the algorithm.




REQ-04


CRITICAL



### Responsible Risk Settings


Configure risk parameters aligned with your account equity. MikeyGoldGrid provides granular control over lot sizing, drawdown limits, and grid spacing to ensure disciplined capital preservation during high-impact news events.

# Questions before deploying MikeyGoldGrid?


Find clear answers about setup, platform requirements, trading risk, and support options. Our automated trading system is built for MetaTrader 5, and we've prepared everything you need to get started with confidence.


Installation
Risk
MT5
Gold Trading











## Frequently Asked Questions


Clear answers to help you understand how MikeyGoldGrid works, how to set it up, and what to expect from your automated gold trading experience.











### Does MikeyGoldGrid work only on MetaTrader 5?


Yes, MikeyGoldGrid is a native Expert Advisor (EA) built exclusively for the MetaTrader 5 platform. It leverages MT5's advanced hedging capabilities, depth of market, and superior backtesting engine to execute its grid strategy on XAU/USD with maximum precision. It is not compatible with MetaTrader 4 or other trading platforms.










### Is the robot focused on XAU/USD?


Absolutely. MikeyGoldGrid is purpose-built for gold trading on the XAU/USD pair. The algorithm's parameters, volatility filters, and grid spacing are meticulously calibrated to the unique market microstructure of spot gold. We do not recommend running it on other instruments, as its performance is optimized exclusively for gold's price action characteristics.










### Does it guarantee profit?


No automated trading system can guarantee profits. Trading gold involves substantial risk, and past performance does not guarantee future results. MikeyGoldGrid is a sophisticated tool that executes a disciplined grid strategy, but market conditions can change. We encourage all users to understand the risks, use appropriate lot sizes, and never trade with capital they cannot afford to lose.










### Can I change risk settings?


Yes. MikeyGoldGrid comes with a comprehensive set of input parameters that give you full control over your risk exposure. You can adjust the initial lot size, grid step distance, take-profit targets, maximum drawdown limits, and recovery multipliers directly from the MT5 terminal. We provide detailed documentation explaining each parameter so you can tailor the robot to your personal risk tolerance.










### Should I use a VPS?


We strongly recommend running MikeyGoldGrid on a Virtual Private Server (VPS) with low latency to your broker's data center. Since the robot operates continuously, a VPS ensures uninterrupted execution without relying on your personal computer's uptime or internet connection. This is critical for maintaining the integrity of the grid strategy, especially during high-impact news events.










### How do I get support during setup?


Every purchase includes access to our detailed installation guide and a private Discord community where you can get help from our team and experienced users. We walk you through downloading the EA file, placing it in the correct MT5 folder, attaching it to a XAU/USD chart, and configuring the initial settings. Premium support tickets are also available for personalized one-on-one assistance.








Still have questions? We're here to help you get started.

Contact Support

# Return Policy


Last Updated: 7/16/2026



At MikeyGoldGrid, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  7/16/2026



MikeyGoldGrid ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: MikeyGoldGrid

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://mikeygoldgrid-4c3beb67.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

- Products Products




- Home

0















# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  July 16, 2026



MikeyGoldGrid is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: MikeyGoldGrid

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  July 16, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - MikeyGoldGrid

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Financial Technology / Algorithmic Trading provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


MikeyGoldGrid provides Financial Technology / Algorithmic Trading through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by MikeyGoldGrid. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: MikeyGoldGrid

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
